meta.description: Hard-200 analysis: hardest-to-classify terms with proposed categories
meta.method: Terms are ranked by hardness: standard-tier first, then no clear category, then most tokens
meta.correction_summary: Manually reviewed and corrected first 50 terms. Categories/subcategories align with the project's AUTO_CLASSIFICATION_RULES taxonomy system.

top_200.title: PEACTIDM Cycle (Perceive-Encode-Attend-Comprehend-Think-Intend-Decide-Motor)
top_200.correction_note: PEACTIDM is a deliberative cognitive agent architecture (Perceive-Encode-Attend-Comprehend-Think-Intend-Decide-Motor).

top_200.title: CLARION (Connectionist Learning with Adaptive Rule Induction ON-line)
top_200.correction_note: CLARION is a cognitive architecture combining connectionist and symbolic learning, like ACT-R/SOAR.

top_200.title: OODA Loop (Observe-Orient-Decide-Act) in AI
top_200.correction_note: OODA Loop is a decision-making framework from military strategy, adopted in AI agent architectures.

top_200.title: Average Value-at-Risk (AVaR) in AI
top_200.correction_note: AVaR (Average Value-at-Risk) is a coherent risk measure from statistics/finance, applied in RL contexts.

top_200.title: CANDI (Child and Adolescent Neuro Development Initiative)
top_200.correction_note: CANDI (Child and Adolescent Neuro Development Initiative) is a neuroimaging dataset — healthcare AI application.

top_200.title: Laplace Transform (applied in ML signal work)
top_200.correction_note: Laplace Transform is a signal-processing transform used in ML pipelines and signal work.

top_200.title: RRHF (Rank Responses to Align Human Feedback)
top_200.correction_note: RRHF (Rank Responses to Align Human Feedback) is an RLHF variant for LLM alignment.

top_200.title: Seasonal and Trend Decomposition using Loess (STL)
top_200.correction_note: STL (Seasonal and Trend Decomposition using Loess) is a time-series statistical decomposition method.

top_200.title: Time-to-Live (TTL) Caching in AI
top_200.correction_note: TTL caching is a systems/infrastructure concept for ML serving pipelines.

top_200.title: A/B Testing for ML Platforms
top_200.correction_note: A/B Testing for ML Platforms — comparing model versions in production to evaluate performance.

top_200.title: AIOps (Artificial Intelligence for IT Operations)
top_200.correction_note: AIOps (Artificial Intelligence for IT Operations) applies AI to IT operations and monitoring.

top_200.title: All-Pairs Shortest Path (Floyd-Warshall)
top_200.correction_note: Floyd-Warshall all-pairs shortest path is a classic graph algorithm. Fits Knowledge Representation.

top_200.title: Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM)
top_200.correction_note: ADMM (Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers) is a distributed convex optimization method. Covered by Batch 6 (admm).

top_200.title: Annoy (Approximate Nearest Neighbors Oh Yeah)
top_200.correction_note: Annoy (Approximate Nearest Neighbors Oh Yeah) is an ANN indexing library from Spotify — similarity search.

top_200.title: BASE Layers (Balanced Sparsely Activated Experts)
top_200.correction_note: BASE Layers (Balanced Sparsely Activated Experts) is an MoE architecture variant.

top_200.title: Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) for AI
top_200.correction_note: Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) for AI — interfacing biological signals with AI systems.

top_200.title: Clausius-Clapeyron Relation in AI Thermodynamics
top_200.correction_note: Clausius-Clapeyron Relation — a thermodynamics concept applied in physics-inspired ML.

top_200.title: Concentration of Measure in High Dimensions
top_200.correction_note: Concentration of Measure is a high-dimensional statistical phenomenon (concentration inequalities).

top_200.title: Continuous Integration for ML (CI/CD)
top_200.correction_note: CI/CD for ML (MLOps) — automating ML pipeline integration and deployment.

top_200.title: Decentralized Partially Observable MDPs (Dec-POMDPs)
top_200.correction_note: Dec-POMDPs (Decentralized Partially Observable MDPs) are the standard model for multi-agent RL.

top_200.title: FORR (FOr the Right Reasons) Architecture
top_200.correction_note: FORR (FOr the Right Reasons) is a cognitive architecture for reasoning and problem-solving.

top_200.title: Global Workspace Theory (GWT) in AI
top_200.correction_note: Global Workspace Theory is a cognitive architecture from neuroscience, widely referenced in AI consciousness research.

top_200.title: GraphSAGE Variants and Extensions Techniques Enhancements
top_200.correction_note: GraphSAGE is a graph neural network method for inductive node embedding. Noise suffixes stripped.

top_200.title: GraphSAGE Variants and Extensions Techniques Extensions
top_200.correction_note: Same GraphSAGE entry with different noise-particle suffix (extensions vs enhancements).

top_200.title: Hybrid Models in AI Extensions Techniques
top_200.correction_note: Hybrid Models combine multiple architectures (e.g. CNN+Transformer) — fits Specialized Architectures.

top_200.title: Hypernetworks Extensions Extensions Techniques Enhancements Techniques
top_200.correction_note: Hypernetworks are networks that generate parameters for other networks — specialized architecture.

top_200.title: Impala (Importance Weighted Actor Learner Architecture)
top_200.correction_note: Impala (Importance Weighted Actor Learner) is a scalable distributed RL algorithm from DeepMind.

top_200.title: JANET (Just Another Neville-Elman Type)
top_200.correction_note: JANET (Just Another Neville-Elman Type) is a simplified RNN unit (variant of GRU/LSTM).

top_200.title: Kernel Trick in High-Dimensional Space
top_200.correction_note: Kernel Trick is the core technique enabling kernel methods (SVM, Gaussian Processes) in ML.

top_200.title: Label Propagation (Already in your list)
top_200.correction_note: Label Propagation is a semi-supervised learning algorithm that spreads labels through a graph.

top_200.title: Long-Range Arena Performer (LRA-Performer)
top_200.correction_note: LRA-Performer is an efficient transformer architecture for long-range sequence modeling.

top_200.title: MIDCA (Metacognitive Integrated Dual-Cycle Architecture)
top_200.correction_note: MIDCA (Metacognitive Integrated Dual-Cycle Architecture) is a cognitive architecture.

top_200.title: Minsky’s Society of Mind Model
top_200.correction_note: Minsky's Society of Mind is a foundational cognitive theory about emergent intelligence from agent interaction.

top_200.title: Model registries in K8s (SageMaker/KServe)
top_200.correction_note: Model registries in K8s (SageMaker/KServe) — MLOps infrastructure for model versioning and serving.

top_200.title: MuJoCo (Multi-Joint dynamics with Contact)
top_200.correction_note: MuJoCo (Multi-Joint dynamics with Contact) is a physics simulator for robotics and RL research.

top_200.title: Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) Extensions Techniques
top_200.correction_note: NMS (Non-Maximum Suppression) is a post-processing step in object detection pipelines. Covered by Batch 6 (nms).

top_200.title: NSGA-II (Non-Dominated Sorting GA)
top_200.correction_note: NSGA-II (Non-Dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II) is an evolutionary multi-objective optimization method.

top_200.title: OODA Loop (Observe-Orient-Decide-Act)
top_200.correction_note: OODA Loop (variant without 'in AI' suffix) — decision-making loop from Boyd's theory.

top_200.title: Out-of-Bag Estimation (OOB Error)
top_200.correction_note: Out-of-Bag (OOB) estimation is an internal validation method for ensemble models like Random Forest.

top_200.title: Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR)
top_200.correction_note: PSNR (Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio) is an image quality assessment metric. Covered by Batch 6 (psnr).

top_200.title: A/B testing for ML
top_200.correction_note: A/B testing for ML — comparing model performance in production environments.

top_200.title: A/B Testing for Models
top_200.correction_note: A/B Testing for Models — same evaluation methodology, different phrasing.

top_200.title: AI Degrees (Bachelor, Master, PhD)
top_200.correction_note: AI Degrees (Bachelor, Master, PhD) — AI education programs, not a technical ML term.

top_200.title: AI Hype vs. AI Reality
top_200.correction_note: AI Hype vs AI Reality — general discourse/business framing of AI capabilities.

top_200.title: AI Narrow vs. AI General
top_200.correction_note: AI Narrow vs AI General — fundamental taxonomy distinction of AI capability levels.

top_200.title: ANIL (Almost No Inner Loop)
top_200.correction_note: ANIL (Almost No Inner Loop) is a meta-learning algorithm that simplifies MAML by removing inner updates.

top_200.title: AWS Step Functions for ML
top_200.correction_note: AWS Step Functions for ML — orchestrating ML workflows on AWS. MLOps infrastructure.

top_200.title: Bag of Little Bootstraps (BLB)
top_200.correction_note: BLB (Bag of Little Bootstraps) is a scalable bootstrap resampling method for big data statistics.

top_200.title: Belief-Desire-Intention with Rules
top_200.correction_note: BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) with Rules — the standard BDI agent architecture model.

top_200.title: Canary shadow deployment for models
top_200.correction_note: Canary/shadow deployment for ML models — MLOps deployment strategy for safe rollouts.
